name: compute_income_tax
description: Computes exact income tax liability for FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27) under new regime, old regime, or both for comparison. New regime has slabs starting at ₹4L with zero tax up to ₹12.75L effective. Old regime allows deductions (80C, 80D, NPS, HRA, home loan interest). Returns total tax, effective rate, 87A rebate if applicable, and a recommendation on which regime saves more.

annual_income.description: Gross annual income in INR before any deductions.

regime.description: Which regime to compute. Use 'compare' to see both side by side with a recommendation. Defaults to 'compare'.

deductions.description: Optional deductions for old regime calculation. All values in INR.

section_80c.description: 80C investments (ELSS, PPF, LIC, EPF, etc.) — capped at ₹1,50,000

section_80d.description: Health insurance premiums — capped at ₹25,000 (₹50,000 if parents are senior citizens)

nps_80ccd1b.description: NPS contribution under 80CCD(1B) — additional ₹50,000 over 80C limit

home_loan_interest.description: Home loan interest under Section 24(b) — capped at ₹2,00,000 for self-occupied
